comment: tactical-diplomat bot band for --sim 5000 --policy tactical-pacifist. RE-BASELINED in batch 12 (light-as-grace, the second-lantern redesign; human sign-off 2026-07-24). THE FLIP: diplomacy is now the RELIABLE path, ABOVE violence — a merciful descent anchors the McGuffin's mood HIGH, so she shines a wide radius (mood_shine_tiers) and lights the climb home after the torch dies (deaths_dark just 14/5000 vs the violent bot's 762 — the whole design in two numbers). Measured: wins 2985/5000 (59.7%), deaths_combat 2001, deaths_dark 14, stuck 0, kills_total 0, spared_total 95412, median_turns_win 1415. Design target: diplomat ~[50,60] — landed 59.7% on the STARTING [TUNE] values (no tuning iteration needed). FINAL batch-12 [TUNE] values: kill_light_penalty (T1), per-kind MonsterDef.kill_valence (rat 0/goblin 15/ogre 30 — not every kill is equally despicable), mood_anchor_weight 20, mood_spare_valence 100, mood_shine_tiers [(75,6),(50,4),(25,2),(MIN,0)] (dark band pinned to 0 so a mood-0 brute gets no shine and dies as before batch 12), rest_heal 1, bot REST_LIGHT_RESERVE 150 / STALL_LIMIT 20 / MAX_REST_TURNS_PER_RUN 300. GUARD (the design's own): if diplomacy CRESTS ~65%, her radius/rest is too generous — pull back; that's a number, not a debate (hence the 66 ceiling). Calibrated for 5000 seeds.
